reasoning: At 8x zoom, multiple AI tells are visible. (1) Gold/orange border transitions through soft gradient blending rather than 2-3 hard pixel tones — characteristic diffusion model output rather than deliberate pixel art shading. (2) Edges are anti-aliased with sub-pixel blending; not crisp single-pixel steps expected of authored pixel art. (3) Scattered pink/red stray pixels visible along the top and right edges of the outer frame — not part of any intentional color. (4) The face medallion icon at upper-left shows mushy/melting detail: internal forms lose pixel-grid alignment at 8x and bleed into surroundings. (5) Bottom panel inner decorative border is geometrically asymmetric — curved notch indentations appear on left/top side but the right side geometry differs, a hallmark of AI spatial confusion. (6) Outline weight varies across the same continuous border segment (1px in places, 2px in others, missing at some corners). Positive: overall semantic structure is coherent (header + body dialog layout), fill areas are relatively clean, color palette is consistent. The issues are enough to flag as marginal; the asymmetric inner border and noise pixels are the clearest hard fails.
